articles.title: Solana Market Cap Skyrockets $11 Billion As Price Jumps 17% – Details
articles.description: Solana, like many Proof-of-Stake (PoS) cryptocurrencies, relies on a decentralized network of validators who secure the network by staking their SOL coins. In exchange for staking, validators earn rewards. However, as Solana’s price began its recent ascent, a noticeable decline in staked SOL was observed.
